meaning: n.<美俚>胖子[原为黄油罐头商标名]
examples: While the Smuckers will boost the ad budget for Crisco and Jif, they're hardly big spenders.
One was a businessman who remembered his hungry childhood when he had white bread, Crisco, and sugar for dinner.
Lard was the thing that was used in all of these, or Crisco.
